info.title: Phufa Cafe POS API
info.description: API for managing the Phufa Café Point of Sale system, including menus, ingredients, orders, customers, and employees.

tags.name: Menu
tags.description: Operations related to food and drink menu items.

tags.name: Ingredient
tags.description: Operations related to ingredients and stock.

tags.name: Employee
tags.description: Operations related to employee management and authentication.

tags.name: Customer
tags.description: Operations related to customer information and loyalty points.

post.description: Authenticate an employee using their Employee ID and password to obtain an access token.

accessToken.description: JWT token for subsequent authenticated requests.

example.message: Missing required field: empId
Invalid employee ID or password.

get.description: Retrieves a list of all available menu items, optionally filtered by category.

parameters.name: category
parameters.description: Filter menu items by category name.

example.message: An unexpected error occurred while retrieving menu items.

post.description: Creates a new menu item along with its default recipe ingredients. Requires admin/owner privileges.

requestBody.description: Menu item details and default recipe.

example.message: Invalid menu data provided. Check required fields and formats.
Authentication required.
Admin or owner privileges required to add menu items.
An unexpected error occurred while creating the menu item.

get.description: Retrieves details of a specific menu item by its ID.

parameters.name: menuId
parameters.description: The unique ID of the menu item.

example.message: Authentication required.
Menu item with ID 'M213560000' not found.
An unexpected error occurred while retrieving the menu item.

put.description: Updates details and the default recipe of an existing menu item. Requires admin/owner privileges.

parameters.name: menuId
parameters.description: The unique ID of the menu item to update.

requestBody.description: Updated menu item details and recipe.

example.message: Invalid menu update data provided.
Authentication required.
Admin or owner privileges required to update menu items.
Menu item with ID 'M213560000' not found.
An unexpected error occurred while updating the menu item.

patch.description: Partially updates a menu item, specifically its status (e.g., available/unavailable). Requires admin/owner privileges.

parameters.name: menuId
parameters.description: The unique ID of the menu item to update.

menuStatus.description: The new status of the menu item.
menuStatus.example: ไม่พร้อมขาย

example.message: Invalid status value provided.
Authentication required.
Admin or owner privileges required to update menu status.
Menu item with ID 'M213560000' not found.
An unexpected error occurred while updating menu status.

delete.description: Deletes a specific menu item. Requires admin/owner privileges. (Use with caution, consider soft delete or status change).

parameters.name: menuId
parameters.description: The unique ID of the menu item to delete.

example.message: Authentication required.
Admin or owner privileges required to delete menu items.
Menu item with ID 'M213560000' not found.
An unexpected error occurred while deleting the menu item.

get.summary: Get Default Recipe for a Menu Item
get.description: Retrieves the default ingredients and quantities for a specific menu item.

parameters.name: menuId
parameters.description: The unique ID of the menu item.

example.message: Authentication required.
Menu item or recipe for ID 'M213560000' not found.
An unexpected error occurred while retrieving the recipe.

get.description: Retrieves a list of all ingredients in stock.

example.message: Authentication required.
An unexpected error occurred while retrieving ingredients.

post.description: Adds a new ingredient to the stock system. Requires admin/owner privileges.

400.description: Bad Request - Invalid input data or duplicate ID.

example.message: Invalid ingredient data or ingredient ID already exists.
Authentication required.
Admin or owner privileges required to add ingredients.
An unexpected error occurred while adding the ingredient.

get.description: Retrieves details of a specific ingredient by its ID.

parameters.name: ingredientId
parameters.description: The unique ID of the ingredient.

example.message: Authentication required.
Ingredient with ID 'I985630000' not found.
An unexpected error occurred while retrieving the ingredient.

put.description: Updates details of an existing ingredient (e.g., quantity, price, category). Requires admin/owner privileges.

parameters.name: ingredientId
parameters.description: The unique ID of the ingredient to update.

example.message: Invalid ingredient update data provided.
Authentication required.
Admin or owner privileges required to update ingredients.
Ingredient with ID 'I985630000' not found.
An unexpected error occurred while updating the ingredient.

delete.description: Deletes a specific ingredient. Checks for dependencies (e.g., usage in recipes) before deletion. Requires admin/owner privileges.

parameters.name: ingredientId
parameters.description: The unique ID of the ingredient to delete.

400.description: Bad Request - Cannot delete ingredient due to dependencies.

example.message: Cannot delete ingredient 'I985630000' as it is used in existing recipes or orders.
Authentication required.
Admin or owner privileges required to delete ingredients.
Ingredient with ID 'I985630000' not found.
An unexpected error occurred while deleting the ingredient.

get.description: Retrieves a list of all ingredient categories.

example.message: Authentication required.
An unexpected error occurred while retrieving ingredient categories.

get.description: Retrieves a list of all orders, potentially filterable by status, date range, employee, or customer. Requires admin/owner privileges.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter by order status (true=paid, false=pending).

parameters.name: employeeId
parameters.description: Filter orders handled by a specific employee ID.

example.message: Authentication required.
Admin or owner privileges required to list all orders.
An unexpected error occurred while retrieving orders.

post.description: Creates a new customer order. Handled by an authenticated employee. Automatically updates ingredient stock upon successful payment (or upon creation if policy dictates).

requestBody.description: Order details including items, customer (optional), and handling employee.

201.description: Order created successfully (likely in pending payment status).

400.description: Bad Request - Invalid input, insufficient stock, etc.

example.message: Invalid order data. Check items, quantities, or ingredient stock.
Authentication required.
An unexpected error occurred while creating the order.

get.description: Retrieves details of a specific order, including its items and customizations.

parameters.name: orderId
parameters.description: The unique ID of the order.

example.message: Authentication required.
Order with ID 'O265980000' not found.
An unexpected error occurred while retrieving the order.

patch.summary: Update Order Status (e.g., Mark as Paid)
patch.description: Updates the status of an order, typically to mark it as paid. This may trigger stock adjustments if not done at creation.

parameters.name: orderId
parameters.description: The unique ID of the order to update.

requestBody.description: The new status for the order.

orderStatus.description: The new status (true for paid, false for pending).

400.description: Bad Request - Invalid status transition or other error.

example.message: Invalid order status update.
Authentication required.
Order with ID 'O265980000' not found.
An unexpected error occurred while updating the order status.

delete.description: Cancels or deletes an unpaid order. Paid orders usually cannot be deleted via API. Requires specific privileges.

parameters.name: orderId
parameters.description: The unique ID of the order to delete.

400.description: Bad Request - Cannot delete a paid order.

example.message: Cannot delete order 'O265980000' because it has already been paid.
Authentication required.
Insufficient privileges to delete this order.
Order with ID 'O265980000' not found.
An unexpected error occurred while deleting the order.

get.description: Retrieves a list of all employees. Requires admin/owner privileges.

example.message: Authentication required.
Admin or owner privileges required to list employees.
An unexpected error occurred while retrieving employees.

post.description: Creates a new employee record. Requires admin/owner privileges.

400.description: Bad Request - Invalid input or duplicate ID/CitizenID.

example.message: Invalid employee data or duplicate Employee ID/Citizen ID.
Authentication required.
Admin or owner privileges required to add employees.
An unexpected error occurred while creating the employee.

get.description: Retrieves details of a specific employee by their Employee ID. Requires admin/owner privileges or self-access.

parameters.name: empId
parameters.description: The unique ID of the employee.

example.message: Authentication required.
Access denied. You can only view your own profile or require admin privileges.
Employee with ID '6609696969' not found.
An unexpected error occurred while retrieving the employee.

put.description: Updates details of an existing employee. Requires admin/owner privileges.

parameters.name: empId
parameters.description: The unique ID of the employee to update.

requestBody.description: Updated employee details (password change might be separate).

example.message: Invalid employee update data provided.
Authentication required.
Admin or owner privileges required to update employees.
Employee with ID '6609696969' not found.
An unexpected error occurred while updating the employee.

delete.description: Deletes a specific employee record. Consider implications (e.g., reassigning orders). Requires admin/owner privileges.

parameters.name: empId
parameters.description: The unique ID of the employee to delete.

400.description: Bad Request - Cannot delete employee (e.g., active orders).

example.message: Cannot delete employee '6609696969' due to existing dependencies (e.g., orders).
Authentication required.
Admin or owner privileges required to delete employees.
Employee with ID '6609696969' not found.
An unexpected error occurred while deleting the employee.

get.description: Retrieves a list of all orders handled by a specific employee.

parameters.name: empId
parameters.description: The unique ID of the employee.

200.description: A list of orders handled by the employee.

example.message: Authentication required.
Access denied. You can only view your own orders or require admin privileges.
Employee with ID '6609696969' not found.
An unexpected error occurred while retrieving employee orders.

get.description: Retrieves a list of all registered customers. Requires admin/owner privileges.

example.message: Authentication required.
Admin or owner privileges required to list customers.
An unexpected error occurred while retrieving customers.

post.description: Creates a new customer record. Can be done by employees.

400.description: Bad Request - Invalid input or duplicate CitizenID/Phone.

example.message: Invalid customer data or duplicate Citizen ID/Phone number.
Authentication required.
An unexpected error occurred while creating the customer.

get.description: Retrieves details of a specific customer using their Citizen ID.

parameters.name: customerId
parameters.description: The Citizen ID of the customer.

example.message: Authentication required.
Customer with Citizen ID '1266985663999' not found.
An unexpected error occurred while retrieving the customer.

put.description: Updates details of an existing customer.

parameters.name: customerId
parameters.description: The Citizen ID of the customer to update.

example.message: Invalid customer update data provided.
Authentication required.
Customer with Citizen ID '1266985663999' not found.
An unexpected error occurred while updating the customer.

post.description: Adds loyalty points to a customer's account, usually after a paid order.

parameters.name: customerId
parameters.description: The Citizen ID of the customer.

pointsToAdd.description: The number of points being added.

example.message: Invalid value for pointsToAdd. Must be a positive integer.
Authentication required.
Customer with Citizen ID '1266985663999' not found.
An unexpected error occurred while adding points.

post.summary: Redeem Loyalty Points for Free Drink
post.description: Redeems 10 points from a customer's account for a free drink reward.

parameters.name: customerId
parameters.description: The Citizen ID of the customer.

example.message: Insufficient points. Requires 10 points to redeem.
Authentication required.
Customer with Citizen ID '1266985663999' not found.
An unexpected error occurred while redeeming points.

get.description: Calculates and returns the total income from paid orders for a specific date. Requires admin/owner privileges.

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: The date for which to calculate income (YYYY-MM-DD).

totalIncome.description: Total income for the specified date.

orderCount.description: Number of paid orders included in the summary.

example.message: Invalid date format. Please use YYYY-MM-DD.
Authentication required.
Admin or owner privileges required to access reports.
An unexpected error occurred while generating the daily income report.

citizenId.description: Unique 13-digit National ID number. Primary Key for Person.

address.example: 99 ม.18 ถ.พหลโยธิน ต.คลองหนึ่ง อ.คลองหลวง จ.ปทุมธานี 12121

profileUrl.description: URL to the person's profile picture.

empId.description: Unique Employee ID. Primary Key for Employee.
Unique Employee ID to be assigned.

menuId.description: Unique ID for the menu item.

menuPrice.description: Standard price of the menu item.

menuStatus.description: Availability status of the menu item.

menuUrl.description: URL to the menu item's image.

name.example: นมอัลมอนด์

costPerUnit.description: Cost per unit of the ingredient.

category.description: Category ID the ingredient belongs to.

name.example: เมล็ดกาแฟอาราบิก้า

ingredientCategoryId.description: Unique ID for the ingredient category.

allowMultipleSelection.description: Whether multiple ingredients from this category can be selected as replacements/additions.

isCustomizable.description: Whether ingredients in this category are typically used for customization.

quantity.description: Quantity of the ingredient used in the default recipe.

isReplaceable.description: Can this ingredient be replaced by customization?

orderDateTime.description: Timestamp when the order was created (UTC+7 in example).

orderStatus.description: Status of the order (false = pending payment, true = paid).

orderPrice.description: Total calculated price for the order.

orderMakerEmpId.description: Employee ID of the staff member who took the order.

orderByCitizenId.description: Citizen ID of the customer who placed the order (optional).

orderItemId.description: Unique ID for this specific item within an order.

menuId.description: ID of the menu item ordered.

quantity.description: Number of this menu item ordered.

note.description: Customer notes or requests for this item.

itemBasePrice.description: Base price of the menu item at the time of order.

customizeCost.description: Total additional cost from customizations for this item * quantity.

itemTotalPrice.description: Total price for this line item ( (BasePrice + CustomizeCost/Quantity) * Quantity ).

customizations.description: List of ingredient customizations for this item.

message.description: A human-readable description of the error.

bearerAuth.description: JWT token obtained via /auth/login endpoint. Include as Authorization: Bearer <token>
